config.title: Code Instructor
config.cloud.enabled.desc: Allow cloud LLM calls (may send code snippets depending on provider configuration).
config.cloud.provider.desc: Cloud provider used for goal deviation scoring and Q&A.
config.cloud.apiKey.desc: API key for the configured cloud provider.
config.validity.buildCommand.desc: Command used to validate code (build/compile). Leave empty to auto-infer from package scripts.
config.validity.testCommand.desc: Optional test command. If empty, the extension will try to infer from package scripts (test/test:ci/test:unit).
config.validity.runTestAfterBuild.desc: If enabled, automatically run test command after a successful build check.
config.validity.cwd.desc: Working directory for validity commands. Empty means workspace root.
config.ingest.planFilePath.desc: Optional: absolute path to a plan file (e.g. plan.md). When it changes, plan steps will be imported automatically.
config.ingest.cursorChatStorageDir.desc: Experimental: a directory to scan (and watch) for Cursor chat storage. The extension will attempt to extract plan-like steps from stored conversations.
config.ingest.traeSessionExportPath.desc: Recommended (Trae): a file or folder path where Trae exports the current chat session. The extension will watch it and import plan steps automatically.
config.telemetry.maxEvents.desc: Max events kept in memory for progress timeline.
